Senedd constituency (1999–)

**Monmouth** ([Welsh](/wiki/Welsh_language "Welsh language"): *Mynwy*) is a [constituency](/wiki/United_Kingdom_constituencies "United Kingdom constituencies") of the [Senedd](/wiki/Senedd "Senedd"). It elects one [Member of the Senedd](/wiki/Member_of_the_Senedd "Member of the Senedd") by the [first past the post](/wiki/First_past_the_post "First past the post") method of election. It is also one of eight constituencies in the [South Wales East](/wiki/South_Wales_East "South Wales East") [electoral region](/wiki/Senedd_constituencies_and_electoral_regions "Senedd constituencies and electoral regions"), which elects four [additional members](/wiki/Additional_member_system "Additional member system") (in addition to the eight constituency members) to produce a degree of [proportional representation](/wiki/Proportional_representation "Proportional representation") for the region as a whole.

## Boundaries

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Monmouth_(Senedd_constituency)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Boundaries")]

![Map](https://maps.wikimedia.org/img/osm-intl,a,a,a,210x200.png?lang=en&domain=en.wikipedia.org&title=Monmouth_%28Senedd_constituency%29&revid=1334582710&groups=_8847e5de6cf5d8e2fce428b70bd5df389c2c0810&parser=legacy)

Map of current boundaries

The constituency was created for the first election to the Assembly, in 1999, with the name and boundaries of the [Monmouth UK Parliament constituency](/wiki/Monmouth_(UK_Parliament_constituency) "Monmouth (UK Parliament constituency)").

The other seven constituencies of the South Wales East electoral region are [Blaenau Gwent](/wiki/Blaenau_Gwent_(Senedd_constituency) "Blaenau Gwent (Senedd constituency)"), [Caerphilly](/wiki/Caerphilly_(Senedd_constituency) "Caerphilly (Senedd constituency)"), [Islwyn](/wiki/Islwyn_(Senedd_constituency) "Islwyn (Senedd constituency)"), [Merthyr Tydfil and Rhymney](/wiki/Merthyr_Tydfil_and_Rhymney_(Senedd_constituency) "Merthyr Tydfil and Rhymney (Senedd constituency)"), [Newport East](/wiki/Newport_East_(Senedd_constituency) "Newport East (Senedd constituency)"), [Newport West](/wiki/Newport_West_(Senedd_constituency) "Newport West (Senedd constituency)") and [Torfaen](/wiki/Torfaen_(Senedd_constituency) "Torfaen (Senedd constituency)").

## Voting

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Monmouth_(Senedd_constituency)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Voting")]

In general elections for the Senedd, each voter has two votes. The first vote may be used to vote for a candidate to become the Member of the Senedd for the voter's constituency, elected by the first past the post system. The second vote may be used to vote for a regional [closed party list](/wiki/Closed_party_list "Closed party list") of candidates. Additional member seats are allocated from the lists by the [d'Hondt method](/wiki/D%27Hondt_method "D'Hondt method"), with constituency results being taken into account in the allocation.
